spec_match.rationale: Masonry layout where DOM order and visual column order diverge — exactly the use case reading-flow targets.

interactive.rationale: Three buttons toggle reading-flow / reading-order modes.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Index promises a Pinterest-style masonry with reading-flow toggle; the page is that.

edge_cases.rationale: Missing: dynamic-add of items, container query interaction, reduced-motion.

references.rationale: Page has NO references / see-also section.

design_system.rationale: Three inline #fff literals on tile bgs; should be var(--bg-paper) or similar.

openQuestions.title: Replace #fff with --bg-paper
openQuestions.detail: Three raw #fff card bgs should be tokens.

openQuestions.title: Add a dynamic insertion lane
openQuestions.detail: Add a button that inserts a new masonry item in the middle of the DOM and shows how reading-flow keeps tab order consistent.

summary: Pinterest-style masonry demo; references and #fff regressions need fixing.
